title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: sync/async clients, streaming, chat & embed endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; npm package ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM & chat providers.

title: LlamaIndex Ollama integration
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama; PyPI: llama-index-llms-ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured open-source web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, multi-user).

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal React chatbot example consuming Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history & syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for Ollama server.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama generators & chatters.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service template exposing Ollama with extra auth, metrics and logging.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG example using Ollama embeddings + LlamaIndex for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot app integrating Ollama for private chat & channel mentions.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JS/TS bindings for Ollama.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package: lightweight Python client for Ollama.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, tips and integrations around Ollama.

title: Ollama on Hacker News
summary: Discussion thread on Ollama’s launch and comparisons to llama.cpp.
